detail: Started CI/CD rewrite to script-first local entrypoints for lint/build/push with Terraform and Azure CLI.
Added scripts/ci-run.sh, scripts/cd-infra-apply.sh, scripts/cd-deploy.sh and rewired verify-local.sh to ci-run all target.
Replaced inline workflow CI/CD command blocks with wrappers around script entrypoints in ci.yml and cd.yml.
Updated README and OPERATOR_RUNBOOK for local script-first CI/CD operations and workflow wrapper behavior.
Ran scripts/verify-local.sh successfully after script/workflow rewrites.
Recorded branch/status/PR state: feature/runner-vm-azcli-cleanup has local modifications and existing PR #20 pending checks.
